---
title: "TorchTextClassifier : <br/><small> un framework unifié pour la codification de textes libres</small>"
title-slide-attributes:
  style: "font-size:0.9em;"
subtitle: |
  **[Séminaire DMS]{.orange}**
author: |
  Meilame Tayebjee,
  Cédric Couralet
date: "03/12/2026"
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
slide-number: true
# uncomment for French presentations:
lang: fr-FR
# for blind readers:
slide-tone: false
chalkboard: # press the B key to toggle chalkboard
  theme: whiteboard
# uncomment to use the multiplex mode:
# multiplex: true
format:
  onyxia-revealjs:
    output-file: index.html
controls: true
css: ../custom.css
from: markdown+emoji
ascii: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

# Contexte et historique

{{< include sections/1-historique.qmd >}}

# Pytorch et Deep Learning

{{< include sections/2-deep-learning-avec-pytorch.qmd >}}

# TorchTextClassifiers:  Architecture et fonctionnalités

{{< include sections/3-ttc-archi-features.qmd >}}

# Utilisation en pratique

{{< include sections/4-en-pratique.qmd >}}

# Perspectives

{{< include sections/5-perspectives.qmd >}}
